name: Winter Vegetable Chowder
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, simmer the first six ingredients (including the bouquet garni) in 1 quart of water until the squash is almost tender.
2. Add the next four ingredients and simmer until the potatoes are almost tender.
3. Add enough cream to achieve the desired consistency.
4. Heat through.
5. Grate nutmeg over each serving.
